arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala and Michael Olise linked up in New York over Christmas
arts.sum: Michael said he was also coming over, so we ate together and spent a day looking around New York.” Musiala shared details of how it all came together in comments captured by the FC Bayern website (via @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany defers to Julian Nagelsmann on Jamal Musiala, Florian Wirtz comparisons
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s Jamal Musiala and Bayer Leverkusen’s Florian Wirtz are two of football’s most exciting attacking talents this year. Only the German national team coach has appraised both players in the same setting at the same time.

arts.ttl: RB Salzburg vs. Bayern Munich: 2024/25 Friendly full coverage
arts.sum: Bavarian Podcast Works — Special Edition: Rating the Bayern Munich defense at midseason Bavarian Podcast Works — Special Edition: Rating the Bayern Munich midfield at midseason

arts.ttl: Philipp Lahm shares thoughts on calls for Manuel Neuer to step aside at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Fellow Bayern legend Philipp Lahm went through a similar situation that Neuer is in right now, slowing down a lot in the 2016-17 season and ultimately deciding to end his career by the time the season ended. Manuel Neuer has come under a lot of criticism this season, with more and more opining that the Bayern Munich legend, who turns 39 in March, is past it and is not on the level Bayern needs anymore.

arts.ttl: Max Eberl ready to enter crunch time for key Bayern Munich contract negotiations
arts.sum: The holidays are over and Eberl knows it’s do or die time for a handful of key players in the Bayern squad. For the key three players, Eberl knows that Bayern is entering crunch time with getting new deals over the line.

arts.ttl: Javi Martínez wants Bayern Munich, Harry Kane to charge down the Bundesliga trophy
arts.sum: Bayern Munich alum Javi Martínez is looking at this year’s Bundesliga race and seeing good signs for his former club. We all want him to win his first trophy and break that curse.”

arts.ttl: BFW 2025 Hot Takes: Bayern Munich’s Coman, Gnabry and Sané will all be shipped out in the next season or two
arts.sum: Leroy Sané, Kingsley Coman, and Serge Gnabry give the impression that their best years are past them. Everyone has been expecting Bayern Munich to offload one or two of the three veteran wingers for a while now.

arts.ttl: BFW 2025 Hot Takes: Leroy Sané is going to do just enough to show Bayern Munich that he’s worth a contract extension
arts.sum: It is no secret that the Bavarians are looking to revamp at least part of their attack with Sané, Kingsley Coman, and Serge Gnabry as the most likely players to be looked at for a departure. Bayern Munich star Leroy Sané has not exactly lived up to the vast hype he had when the club spent a tumultuous year-and-a-half pursuing him when he was a Manchester City player.

arts.ttl: Journalist: Liverpool player could head to La Liga soon, clubs locked in talks
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Stefan Bajcetic could join Real Betis on loan this month. According to Fabrizio Romano, the two clubs are currently locked in advanced talks to get the deal across the line. The 20-year-old midfielder is currently on loan at Red Bull Salzburg, but he has not had ample opportunities with them.
